description_long: This ornate clock tower features a cylindrical body with intricate relief carvings of foliage and birds along its surface. The front side displays a circular clock face with Roman numerals, set above a recessed alcove containing two detailed, colorful bird sculptures perched on green foliage. The roof is domed and decorated with floral motifs, culminating in a small finial at the top. The base is wide and rounded, providing stability and a sense of grandeur. The overall color is a pale, off-white with the exception of the birds, which are painted in naturalistic blue and orange hues. The craftsmanship and decorative elements suggest a neoclassical influence, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting.
description: An ornate, cylindrical clock tower with a domed roof, detailed relief carvings, and a front-facing clock above a pair of colorful bird sculptures.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the tower with detailed relief carvings of foliage and birds, and a partial glimpse of the clock face and bird alcove.
description_view_1: The back of the tower is visible, showing mostly plain surface with subtle relief patterns and no clock face or bird sculptures.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, with visible relief carvings and a partial view of the clock and bird alcove.
description_view_3: The front view displays the circular clock face with Roman numerals and the alcove containing two colorful bird sculptures, framed by ornate relief work.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a gold rim, white background, and black Roman numerals marking the hours. It features two black hands (hour and minute) and no second hand. The design is simple and classic, with no additional decorative elements on the face itself.
